calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Joseph Helfrick of the law offices of Nelson & Kennard (916-920-2295) appears as counsel for plaintiff/judgment creditor, Ford Motor Credit Company, LLC

No other appearance is made in this matter

There being no appearance on behalf of claimant/judgment debtor, the claim of exemption of Catherine M. Taylor is DENIED. Levied funds are ordered released to the judgment creditor. Court will sign and file order to be served by clerk.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Vicki Gross, CSR No. 5525, e-mail: vgross@sftc.org. (L&M302)
